description: High-density performance line Arm-based 32-bit MCU with 256 to 512KB Flash, USB, CAN, 11 timers, 3 ADCs, 13 communication interfaces

D8.name: OSC_IN
D8.description: Oscillator input (also: PD0 — General-purpose I/O, OSC_IN/FSMC_D2/CAN_RX)

D7.name: OSC_OUT
D7.description: Oscillator output (also: PD1 — General-purpose I/O, OSC_OUT/FSMC_D3/CAN_TX)

5.name: OSC_IN
5.description: Oscillator input (also: PD0 — General-purpose I/O, OSC_IN/FSMC_D2/CAN_RX)

6.name: OSC_OUT
6.description: Oscillator output (also: PD1 — General-purpose I/O, OSC_OUT/FSMC_D3/CAN_TX)

VIN.parameter: Input voltage on five volt tolerant pin

VIN_VSS_0_3_to_4_0.parameter: Input voltage on any other pin

|ΔVDDx|.parameter: Variations between different VDD power pins

|VSSx-VSS|.parameter: Variations between all the different ground pins

IVDD.parameter: Total current into VDD/VDDA power lines (source)

IVSS.parameter: Total current out of VSS ground lines (sink)

IIO.parameter: Output current source by any I/Os and control pin

VIL.parameter: Standard IO input low level voltage

VIH.parameter: Standard IO input high level voltage

VOL.parameter: Output low level voltage for an I/O pin
VOL.conditions: TTL port, IIO = +8 mA, 2.7 V < VDD < 3.6 V

VOH.parameter: Output high level voltage for an I/O pin
VOH.conditions: CMOS port, IIO = -8 mA, 2.7 V < VDD < 3.6 V

review_items: Freeze USB role, connector type, and VBUS policy before schematic sign-off.
Verify DP/DM routing, ESD placement, and supply/domain wiring for the selected USB instance.
Freeze MCU-to-transceiver channel assignment before schematic sign-off.
Review CAN termination, standby, and bus protection around the external transceiver.
Freeze bus width, IO voltage, and removable-vs-embedded media assumptions before schematic sign-off.
Review pull-ups, card-detect/write-protect policy, and power sequencing for the selected storage interface.
